query:
-- Check the most recent successful runs across every automation in audit tables
SELECT 'nightlyAgendaEmails' as automation, status, COUNT(*) as cnt, MAX(createdAt) as last_at
  FROM nightlyAgendaEmails GROUP BY status
UNION ALL
SELECT 'nightlyLessonGens', status, COUNT(*), MAX(createdAt) FROM nightlyLessonGens GROUP BY status
UNION ALL
SELECT 'dailyRecapEmails', status, COUNT(*), MAX(createdAt) FROM dailyRecapEmails GROUP BY status
UNION ALL
SELECT 'morningBriefs', status, COUNT(*), MAX(createdAt) FROM morningBriefs GROUP BY status
UNION ALL
SELECT 'classroomAgendaSyncs', status, COUNT(*), MAX(createdAt) FROM classroomAgendaSyncs GROUP BY status
UNION ALL
SELECT 'icalRefreshes', status, COUNT(*), MAX(createdAt) FROM icalRefreshes GROUP BY status
UNION ALL
SELECT 'powerSchoolIngests', status, COUNT(*), MAX(createdAt) FROM powerSchoolIngests GROUP BY status
ORDER BY automation, status;
